---
title: 'Biblical Languages Tools'
date: '2024-11-14T01:09:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Language'
  - 'Hebrew'
  - 'Greek'
---

Some of my favorite Language assist tools from around the web:<br /><br /><br /><br />

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/heb-parts-adcd2b1636b2.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="925" data-original-width="720" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/heb-parts-0c9b4d230835.jpg" width="249" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/root-bb4a30e78777.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1033" data-original-width="687" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/root-49b24b6e7754.jpg" width="213" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ahhahaha-03d90c568c3f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="514" data-original-width="720" height="228" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ahhahaha-02793170ee83.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/heb-persona-place-gender-e78fb2cae96e.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="720" data-original-width="1600" height="144" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/heb-persona-place-gender-6aa76830a026.png" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/heb-3beb8162a684.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="356" data-original-width="498" height="229" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/heb-05fb76b4c822.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/greekalphabet1-71be6d242cf5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="739" data-original-width="682" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/greekalphabet1-fa020bbf5990.jpg" width="295" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/def-e3de0133050d.gif" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="305" data-original-width="227" height="305" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/def-888da144d350.gif" width="227" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ev-719d355fd172.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="540" data-original-width="720" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ev-3e9b08a51acb.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br style="text-align: left;" /><br style="text-align: left;" /><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; text-align: left;">Shalom&nbsp;<span face="sans-serif" style="background-color: white; color: #202122; font-size: 14px;">×©Ö¸××œ×•Ö¹×</span>: Live Long and Prosper!</span><span style="text-align: left;"></span><br style="text-align: left;" /><div class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: left;"><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe</span></div><span style="text-align: left;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant | Freelancer | Bible Nerd&nbsp;</span><i style="text-align: left;">*Written withs some editing and research assistance from ChatGPT-4o</i></div><br />
